agent_hint: Create a new leave request. Required: employee_id (reference to thr_employee), leave_type (ANNUAL/SICK/PERSONAL/MATERNITY/OTHER), start_date, end_date, days. Optional: reason. Auto-generated: code (LV-yyyyMMdd-seq), status (pending).
output_description: Returns the created leave request record with auto-generated code and initial status pending.

agent_hint: Update an existing leave request. Editable fields: employee, leave_type, start_date, end_date, days, reason. Status is NOT editable here — use state transition commands instead.
precondition_description: Leave request must exist; status field cannot be changed via this command.
output_description: Returns the updated leave request record with all modified fields.

agent_hint: Approve a pending leave request. Transitions status from pending to approved. Only leave requests in pending status can be approved.
precondition_description: Leave request must be in pending status.
output_description: Returns the updated leave request record with status set to approved.

agent_hint: Reject a pending leave request. Transitions status from pending to rejected. Only leave requests in pending status can be rejected.
precondition_description: Leave request must be in pending status.
output_description: Returns the updated leave request record with status set to rejected.

agent_hint: Cancel a pending leave request. Transitions status from pending to cancelled. Only the requester or HR manager should cancel leave requests. Only pending requests can be cancelled.
precondition_description: Leave request must be in pending status.
output_description: Returns the updated leave request record with status set to cancelled.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认删除此请假申请？此操作不可撤销。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Confirm delete this leave request? This action is irreversible.

agent_hint: Delete a leave request permanently. Irreversible operation. Precondition: leave request status must be pending — approved, rejected, or cancelled requests cannot be deleted.
precondition_description: Leave request must be in pending status; approved, rejected, or cancelled requests cannot be deleted.
output_description: Returns confirmation of deletion; the leave request record is permanently removed.

agent_hint: Retrieve a single leave request record by ID. Returns all fields including employee, leave type, dates, days, status, and reason.
precondition_description: Leave request with the specified ID must exist.
output_description: Returns the full leave request record including all fields.

agent_hint: Query leave request records with pagination and filtering. Supports filters by status, leave_type, employee. Supports keyword search on code.
precondition_description: No preconditions — returns empty list if no leave requests match.
output_description: Returns a paginated list of leave request records matching the specified filters.
